{{Quote|We now have the coordinates to a secret Separatist weapons factory on Diorda.|[[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Luminara Unduli/Legends|Luminara Unduli]]|<ref name="Versus">{{CWACite|8|Versus (comic story)}}</ref>}}
'''Diorda''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] that contained a secret [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] [[Diorda weapons factory|weapons factory]]. During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], [[Luminara Unduli/Legends|Luminara Unduli]] was assigned to investigate the secret factory, and after a duel in [[Mondo-Mod]] the Hutt's [[Arena of Doom]], Luminara received the coordinates of the weapons factory, and presumably used them to destroy it.
